history.msg: Captured 5 resources (source=human) — primary: python.langchain.com/docs/modules/agents/, docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/tool-use, Chip Huyen AI Engineering, cloud.google.com/discover/what-are-ai-agents, lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/
Corpus generated — standard depth, diagram=true, ~3210 words. 6 concepts introduced. All 5 primary resources cited. 4-tier decision matrix with worked examples. Human-in-loop deferred to 14.8.
Corpus critic PASSED cycle 1 — all 6 checks green. ~3500w standard. All 5 cited. 3 soft: output parsing/system prompt/sentiment analysis undefined (same code, non-blocking).

HITL #2 complete — all 9 sections approved as written, depth=standard, expected_delivery=7min, diagram=true. Intent: four-branch decision flowchart (Q1-Q4). 3 soft undefined_terms accepted (output parsing/system prompt/sentiment analysis).

Diagram critic PASSED cycle 1 — TB flowchart, 10 nodes, 4-branch decision tree. Color escalation: Direct Call(green)->Chained Calls(purple)->RAG(blue)->Agent(orange). Reconsider(grey). All labels readable at 1400px. No scope creep.
Reading generated — 1352w, 7min. All 5 cited. Diagram embedded. 3 soft findings resolved (output parsing/system prompt/sentiment analysis).
Quiz generated — 6 MCQ, positions [2,0,3,1,2,0], max_share=0.333, bias_defense=true. All 5 LOs covered (LO3 twice).
Reading critic PASS cycle 2 — scope_creep resolved (14.8 block collapsed to 1 sentence). All checks clean.
Quiz critic PASS cycle 1 — positional_bias 0.333, length_bias 0.333, all 5 LOs covered. 2 borderline soft findings (q1/q5 length). Sidecar field inaccuracy noted (non-blocking).
HITL #3 approved — 1352w reading (cycle 2), 6q quiz, diagram PNG. 2 soft quiz findings accepted.
